And we gon' make you lose your mind We just wanna see ya

en: In the club, party rock Lookin' for the girl, she on the jock, huh Non-stop when we in the spot

zhTW: 在夜店裡派對搖滾，找女孩，不停歇
vi: Trong club, party rock, tìm cô gái, không ngừng

en: Booty movin' weight like she on the block With a drink, I got some know Top jeans tattooed cause I'm rock, raw
ja: 動いてる、飲み物持って、ジーンズにタトゥー、ロックだ
zhTW: 動起來，拿著飲料，牛仔褲上有刺青，就是搖滾
vi: Đang nhảy, cầm ly, quần jean xăm, rock luôn

en: Half black, half white, diamond low Gang of money, open top Yeah, I'm runnin' through these hoes
ja: ハーフ、ダイヤ、金、走り回ってる
zhTW: 一半一半，鑽石，一堆錢，敞篷車
vi: Nửa này nửa kia, kim cương, tiền, xe mui trần
